name: aggproj_targeted_exp039
hypothesis: TARGETED head selection. exp039-step1 ranked 16 heads by consistent induction gap: top-5=[7,10,12,3,9] (mean gap 0.02-0.029, beat rest in 73% of episodes), bottom-11 are noise/anti-inducing. exp037 zeroed a RANDOM half -> 0.30/0.0. This zeros _agg_proj for the NON-inducing heads (keep top-5 only) to concentrate the partial-retrieval signal (exp038: 0.30 = 3.5x format, ~14%/digit). If concentrating the inducing heads pushes per-digit 14% higher and recall emerges -> editable side reopens. If still 0.30/0.0 -> signal too weak/noisy to amplify structurally -> handoff final. Init-time mask (parity OK). Direct comparison to exp001 (all 16 heads, 0.296/0.0) and exp037 (random 8 heads, 0.30/0.0).
